title: QueueInfo.java - Job Queue Management
description: QueueInfo.java is a crucial component in Hadoop MapReduce's architecture, responsible for managing job queue information. It implements the Writable interface for serialization, storing details like queue name, scheduling info, state, job statuses, and child queues. The class offers constructors for initializing queue data with varying levels of detail, along with getter and setter methods for accessing this information. It relies on several Hadoop and Java classes for its functionality, including Text, Writable, WritableUtils, Properties, ArrayList, List, and Properties from the standard Java library, as well as an assumed QueueState enum from the Hadoop MapReduce codebase. This class plays a significant role in the MapReduce Job Scheduling and Queue Management pattern, ensuring efficient job distribution and execution across the cluster.

TITLE: QueueInfo.java - Job Queue Management

DESCRIPTION:
QueueInfo.java is a crucial component in Hadoop MapReduce's architecture, responsible for managing job queue information. It implements the Writable interface for serialization, storing details like queue name, scheduling info, state, job statuses, and child queues. The class offers constructors for initializing queue data with varying levels of detail, along with getter and setter methods for accessing this information. It relies on several Hadoop and Java classes for its functionality, including Text, Writable, WritableUtils, Properties, ArrayList, List, and Properties from the standard Java library, as well as an assumed QueueState enum from the Hadoop MapReduce codebase. This class plays a significant role in the MapReduce Job Scheduling and Queue Management pattern, ensuring efficient job distribution and execution across the cluster.
